title: Aftermath.
content:
The murmuring of bees has ceased;
    But murmuring of some
    Posterior, prophetic,
    Has simultaneous come, --

    The lower metres of the year,
    When nature's laugh is done, --
    The Revelations of the book
    Whose Genesis is June.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Aftermath."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
